subcodes.first_line: A noble Book sent down by God, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, it guideth the servants unto the straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب کریم نزل من لدی الله رب العالمین انه یهدی العباد الی صراط مستقیم و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance
